rows.description: Computat Math: Hoole Rectories a secunda Die Novembris 1723
rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct header row, which GPT-5-mini incorrectly merged with the subsequent line. Visual verification combined the most accurate description elements from both extractors: 'Hoole' and 'secunda' from GPT's combined text, and 'Rectories' from gemini-flash, matching the image.

rows.notes: Gemini-flash correctly identified this as a distinct header row, directly following the first, which GPT-5-mini incorrectly merged. Visual verification confirms the transcription and distinct nature of the row.
Both extractors identified this as a header. GPT-5-mini's spelling 'Arrearagia' (with a double 'r') is a more accurate visual transcription of the handwriting than gemini-flash's 'Arrcaragia'.
The monetary amounts (£60, s0, d0) are in consensus. Gemini-flash's description 'Grinvar' is visually more accurate than GPT-5-mini's 'Guisnar'.
